auth.prepareAccount: Allow me to prepare your account.
auth.helloAgain: Hello, {name}. Good to see you again.
auth.almostThere: Almost there — confirm your email to sign in.
auth.successDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open the email and click the link to activate your account; then you can sign in with email and password.
auth.error.connection: Could not connect to the server. Check your environment credentials and service availability.
auth.error.exists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.error.weak: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email to receive a reset link.
auth.forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for that email, we sent a password reset link (valid for a limited time).
auth.reset.title: New password
auth.reset.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
auth.reset.invalidBody: Request a new link from the login page.
auth.hero.headline: Wealth management that matches your lifestyle
auth.hero.bullet1.title: Gemini Artificial Intelligence
auth.hero.bullet2.title: Multi-Tenant (Personal & Business)
auth.hero.bullet2.hint: Personal and business wealth, with elegance.
auth.hero.bullet3.title: Lifestyle Analysis
auth.hero.bullet3.hint: Budget and habits aligned with what you value.
